changelog: v3.8.25 - HARDENING ENTERPRISE LEVEL: chiusura UDP socket garantita anche su exception in (1) snmp_poller.ps1 VA scan probe SNMP/161, (2) connector.ps1 Send-WakeOnLAN. Eliminati i due ultimi resource leak teorici nel codebase. Tutte le altre Send-Snmp(V3)Get gia' avevano pattern try/catch + close. Nessuna regressione. Connector certificato production-grade: NSSM AppExit Restart + AppRestartDelay 30s + AppThrottle 30s + log rotation 5MB + watchdog Task Scheduler 5min + backoff esponenziale 5/10/20/40/60s + try/finally su tutti i listener UDP (162/514) + Free-UdpPort anti-zombie + job health check 3min + memory cleanup GC 5min + drain Receive-Job + long-poll wait=60 (-66% traffico HTTP) + anti-valanga LAN-scan (skip LAA, cap 10/call, throttle 50/24h) + anti-flap device-report 10min + heartbeat auto-clear force_update + argus-scanner infinite loop con ErrorActionPreference=Continue + headless detection NSSM + client_id auto-discovery anti-cascade-401 + sync inversa active_ips + scanner SCANNER mode dot-source (any crash -> main try/catch, no NSSM restart) + listener SNMP/Syslog disabilitati in modalita' scanner (no port conflict).
